rationale: Lens: decomposition + impacted-domains parity for the C+B delta. Verified at 8b07e89f. (1) Parity is exact. gitutil is dropped from BOTH Impacted Domains and Scope AND is genuinely zero-touch: the only non-spec diff vs origin/main (f02a3a49) is workflow/OWNERSHIP.yaml +1 line adding internal/lifecycle; BranchExistsE and show-ref have 0 Go hits. No touched-but-undeclared, no declared-but-untouched: approve/complete/lifecycle/setup/.claude/.agents skills + workflow OWNERSHIP.yaml all map to workflow (each path is in workflow/OWNERSHIP.yaml); executor comment-fix + AC12 test map to execution (internal/executor/** declared). internal/lifecycle is claimed by exactly one domain (workflow, line 9); gitutil stays execution-only and is correctly absent from the spec's declared set. (2) Clean 2-3 bead cleave: AC11 (TestApproveImpl_UnreadableRefStoreAbortsPreScan) lives in internal/approve and folds into the gate bead alongside the R1 pre-scan ordering it pins (impl.go:249 MergeBase grounded); AC12 (TestFinalizeEpic_MergesOnlyWorktreeRealBranches) lives in internal/executor and co-locates with the :396-398 comment-correction work in the same merge loop (List@:383/HasPrefix@:385/MergeInto@:402 grounded). (3) No over/under-scope: deleting the classifier removes ALL gitutil scope (now zero-touch = correctly dropped); the two structural ACs land only in domains already touched. Both new tests RED (0 hits) at HEAD. No parity gap or decomposition defect.

findings.item: C+B: gitutil dropped from Impacted Domains + Scope, parity re-checked
findings.evidence: git diff f02a3a49..8b07e89f over internal/ shows ONLY workflow/OWNERSHIP.yaml +1; BranchExistsE=0 hits, show-ref=0 hits in internal go. gitutil neither declared nor touched — no touched-but-undeclared/declared-but-untouched.

findings.item: AC12 executor test maps to declared execution domain
findings.evidence: internal/executor/** declared under execution; executor already touched for the :396-398 comment fix (phrase present, RED-on-AC8). AC12 pins List@:383/HasPrefix@:385/MergeInto@:402 in the same loop — cohesive, no new domain needed.

findings.item: AC11 approve test folds into gate bead
findings.evidence: internal/approve declared workflow; impl.go:249 exec.MergeBase pre-scan grounded. AC11 co-locates with the R1 gate ordering it pins.
grep -c internal/lifecycle across all domain OWNERSHIP.yaml: workflow=1 (line 9), execution/core/context-system=0. AC10 whole-set invariant holds.

findings.item: Decomposition still ~2-3 pannellable beads, no over/under-scope
findings.evidence: Workflow gate bead (approve gate + lifecycle error-preserving core + complete predicate extract + ownership + ADR + skill docs, AC1-7/9/10/11) and execution bead (comment + AC12 + no-regression pins, AC8/12) cleave cleanly along domain + test-file boundaries.

findings.item: Both C+B structural tests genuinely RED at HEAD
findings.evidence: TestFinalizeEpic_MergesOnlyWorktreeRealBranches and TestApproveImpl_UnreadableRefStoreAbortsPreScan each 0 hits in internal/ at 8b07e89f.
